zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，等待方向选择
zh.content:
SOL/USD现报83.74，24小时波动极窄，价格维持在83.46至83.86区间内整理，显示市场观望情绪较浓。当前价格低于20日均线84.37，短线结构偏空，多头动能暂未恢复。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持负值，说明空头仍占据主动，短周期趋势存在继续回调风险。虽然RSI数据缺失，但结合价格贴近日内低位运行，可推测市场买盘力度偏弱，反弹持续性有限。

关键支撑位关注83.40，若跌破可能进一步测试82.80区域；上方阻力集中在84.40附近，同时也是20日均线压制位置。若后续放量突破84.40，则有机会重新挑战85整数关口。

操作策略方面，短线交易者宜保持谨慎，当前更适合等待突破确认后再顺势跟进。激进投资者可关注83.40附近低吸机会，但需严格设置止损；稳健者则建议等待MACD改善后再考虑中线布局。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 83.74 and remains under mild short-term pressure after slipping below the 20-period moving average at 84.37. Price action is compressed within a narrow intraday range of 83.46–83.86, showing limited momentum but also an absence of aggressive selling. The slight negative daily change suggests consolidation rather than a decisive breakdown, though the market currently favors sellers while price stays beneath the moving average.

The MACD value at -0.364 indicates bearish momentum is still present, even though the signal line is unavailable for confirmation. Without RSI data, momentum assessment relies more heavily on price structure and moving averages. The inability to reclaim the SMA(20) keeps the short-term trend tilted downward. A sustained move back above 84.37 would improve sentiment and potentially shift the market into a recovery phase.

Immediate support appears near the session low at 83.46, with stronger downside interest likely emerging around 83.00. If that level fails, sellers could test the 82.50 region. On the upside, resistance sits first at 83.86 and then near the SMA barrier around 84.37–84.50. A breakout above that zone may open room toward 85.00, while repeated rejection there would reinforce the current range-bound structure.

For traders, a cautious approach is appropriate. Momentum participants may wait for confirmation above 84.37 before considering long exposure, targeting higher resistance zones with controlled risk. Short-term bearish setups remain valid while price stays below the moving average, especially on failed rebounds near resistance. Range traders could also exploit movement between 83.46 support and 83.86 resistance until volatility expands and direction becomes clearer.
